yieldType: Tokenized money market fund yield / short-duration U.S. government securities yield
yieldFrequency: Business-day price/NAV reporting; yield accrues through fund activity

_meta.notes: Yield type, reporting cadence, and currency are source-backed. Current yield and historical yield metrics are time-sensitive and should be refreshed from RWA.xyz and/or Hashnote price-report data immediately before import. No explicit benchmark, yield-vs-benchmark, 90d APY, 52w min/max, or 30d standard deviation was verified in source-discovery.
